playbook.intent: Engaged audience → paying signups in a single-day sprint.
playbook.scope: Once-a-month one-day sprint that wrings paid signups from an existing audience: tightens the conversion funnel, runs a soft promo, instruments one CTA, and ends with measurable paid conversions.

success-criteria.criterion: ≥10 paid signups in the sprint window

stage.name: Audit
stage.intent: Know exactly where the funnel leaks.

tasks.task: Map the audience → landing → checkout flow
Pull recent conversion data per stage
Pick the one stage with the worst drop-off

outputs.output: Funnel map with leak called out

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the priority leak is named.

stage.name: Stage CTA
stage.intent: One CTA fix wired to the leakiest stage.

tasks.task: Rewrite the landing copy to address the leak
Add one testimonial above the CTA

stage.decision-gate: Advance once a stranger completes the flow on first try.

stage.name: Promo
stage.intent: Soft promo across owned channels in one day.

tasks.task: Tweet thread with proof and CTA
Email blast referencing the audience signal
Cross-post to IndieHackers with personal angle

stage.decision-gate: Advance once all channels have shipped within the sprint day.

stage.name: Measure
stage.intent: Compare conversion before and after the CTA change.

tasks.task: Document the verdict and update the loop

stage.decision-gate: Keep CTA only if uplift is ≥15%; otherwise rollback.

extra.value: [Cold acquisition — existing audience only, Pricing redesign — single CTA tweak, Cross-product promotion — one product at a time]
[Engaged audience on at least one channel, A product with a paid path live]
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content audience-to-customer-conversion-sprint --format md, agent: faion get-content audience-to-customer-conversion-sprint --format context, json: faion get-content audience-to-customer-conversion-sprint --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
